name: James' World's Hottest Wings!
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chicken Wings cut up Buffalo style
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, carefully blend the peppers, white wine, vinegar, and all spices together. Wear rubber gloves to avoid burns from fumes.
2. Transfer the puree into a bowl and marinate the wings in the refrigerator for 5 days.
3. After 5 days, carefully remove the wings and broil them until cooked through (approximately 15 minutes, plus or minus 5 minutes).
4. In a saucepan, add the remaining marinade to a stove-top pot. Gradually stir in 1/4 cup of sugar and heat until it reaches a boil.
5. Reduce the heat and simmer until thickened. Pour the sauce over the wings and re-broil for about 5 more minutes before serving with soda water for an enhanced heat effect. Keep plenty of ice water nearby.
